title: verbena polyantha
intro: Verbena polyantha, also known as the tropical verbena, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its clusters of small, fragrant flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective against various health issues such as fever, coughs, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Verbena polyantha include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Verbena polyantha can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat respiratory issues, skin problems, and other health conditions.
